scripts.demo:safe: npm run policy:check -- --repo demo-repo --branch main --env staging --deploy "npm run deploy:staging" --rollback "npm run rollback:staging" --tests true --change-window true --changed-files "src/service.ts" --fail-on high --by demo-user
scripts.demo:unsafe: npm run policy:check -- --repo demo-repo --branch feature/infra-risk --env prod --deploy "npm run deploy:prod" --rollback "npm run rollback:prod" --tests true --change-window true --changed-files "infra/main.tf" --fail-on high --by demo-user
scripts.demo:ai: npm run policy:review -- --repo demo-repo --branch feature/infra-risk --env prod --deploy "npm run deploy:prod" --rollback "npm run rollback:prod" --tests true --change-window true --changed-files "infra/main.tf" --fail-on high --by demo-user
scripts.demo:breakglass: npm run dev -- plan --repo demo-repo --branch feature/infra-risk --env prod --deploy "npm run deploy:prod" --rollback "npm run rollback:prod" --tests true --change-window false --changed-files "infra/main.tf" --break-glass true --incident-ticket "INC-2026-001" --by incident-commander
